**⚠️ READ THIS BEFORE SUBMITTING A PULL REQUEST ⚠️**

Thank you for your interest in contributing to LOCKON SDA! 

Please be advised that this repository is the **Legacy/Demo** version of the project. It is currently frozen and serves only as a historical proof-of-concept.

**We are not accepting any Pull Requests for this codebase.**

Any Pull Requests opened here will be automatically closed. The project has since evolved into a full Enterprise SaaS suite which is maintained privately. 

Thank you for your support and understanding!
